title: • Encourages self-reflection on their intellectual journey.
content:
• Encourages self-reflection on their intellectual journey.
• Makes literature feel like an adventure rather than just analysis.

📜 4. Expanded Mastery Exam “Fool’s Gauntlet” with Streak Consequences

📜 New Additions:
✔ If students fail a Mastery Exam, they are “cast out” and must re-enter the Hero’s Journey at a lower level.
✔ Each level has an increasing skill-based check.
✔ Each failure has a thematic consequence tied to a literary concept.

Consequence & Skill Check for Mastery Exam Failures
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 119 (chunk 119/555)
